Compact & Reasonable A Useful Tool for Research & Development
Design, development and production are done by our India factory The ASB-50MB could easily be used in a product development role as where lower manufacturing costs allow an extremely attractive an economic and flexible test machine for projects that may be selling price. Additionally, this is a very compact machine requiring destined for multi-cavity production. Or, it might be used for testing minimal space and utility support meaning it is a perfect machine new raw materials and processing techniques.
for minimum initial investment by a start-up company or one that is High Level Functions in an Economic Machine
upgrading to fully automated production. A variety of specialized functions can be utilized including the use of a gate-cutter and champagne base operation*1  which allows high quality small containers to be molded with ease. The use of an electric servo for mold indexing ensures fast dry cycle and hygienic operation. *1: Option
Typical Containers
• Applications : Pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, liquor, infusion bottles, detergent, mouthwash, baby feeding bottles, spice, salad dressing, foods, mineral water etc. ●  Production Line in • Materials : ASB’s Indian Factory
PET, PP, PC, PEN, PS, PES, PPSU, recycled PET etc. Various Applications and Materials • Shapes : Simple but effective fully automatic machine for the production of a Plain round, non-round, wide-mouth, oval, ultra-light etc.
wide variety of containers in any market. From six cavity 3~30ml container right up to 2.5L single cavity production is possible. As with all ASB Series machines, it has the flexibility to process materials other than PET including PP and PC.
